phases.name: Command Center Bootstrap
phases.description: Internal dev dashboard to track and orchestrate the entire CMSMasters Portal build across 7 phases.

tasks.title: Monorepo scaffold
tasks.description: Initialize Turborepo monorepo with apps/ and packages/ workspace structure, root package.json, tsconfig base, and workspace tooling (eslint, prettier).
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: Turborepo workspace boots, apps/command-center and packages/ directories exist, pnpm install succeeds at root.
tasks.notes: Bootstrapped with create-turbo, adjusted tsconfig paths for strict mode.

tasks.title: Command Center app skeleton
tasks.description: Create apps/command-center as a Next.js 15 App Router project on port 4000. Set up root layout, global styles import, and placeholder page routes for all 6 dashboard sections.
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: next dev runs on port 4000, App Router layout.tsx present, 6 route folders scaffolded (mission-control, phases, components, content, architecture, dependencies).
tasks.notes: Used Next.js 15 with React 19. Configured next.config.ts with custom port.

tasks.title: Design token system
tasks.description: Create theme/tokens.ts with all design primitives: color palette (surface, text, accent, status), typography scale, spacing scale, border radii, shadow levels, and animation durations.
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: tokens.ts exports typed token objects for colors, typography, spacing, radii, shadows, and animations. All values are consumed by Tailwind config.
tasks.notes: Dark theme only for Command Center (internal tool). Forked color palette from Pipboard design language.

tasks.title: Atom components
tasks.description: Build foundational atom-level components: Card, Checkbox, Input, Modal, Select, StatusBadge, ProgressBar. All use design tokens. No shadcn/ui — custom implementations.
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: 7 atom components exist in src/components/atoms/, each accepts typed props, uses cn() for classes, and renders correctly in dark theme.
tasks.notes: All atoms are Server Components except those with interactive props.

tasks.title: Data layer (lib/data.ts)
tasks.description: Implement all file-system data reading functions in lib/data.ts: getPhases(), getTasks(), getADRs(), getComponents(), getDependencies(). Graceful empty-state handling when files are missing.
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: lib/data.ts exports typed async functions that read JSON/MD from workplan/ and monorepo. Returns empty arrays (not errors) when files absent.
tasks.notes: Uses Node.js fs/promises with try-catch. All types defined in lib/types.ts.

tasks.title: CLI scanner (cc:scan)
tasks.description: Build cli/scan.ts Node.js script that scans monorepo, counts components, reads ADRs, tallies task statuses, and writes summary JSON to workplan/scan-results.json.
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: pnpm cc:scan runs without error, produces workplan/scan-results.json with component count, adr count, phase progress, and dependency graph snapshot.
tasks.notes: Script reads package.json dependency graphs and traverses src/components/ for component counts.

tasks.title: Tailwind config with token mapping
tasks.description: Configure tailwind.config.ts to extend the default theme with all design tokens from tokens.ts. Map token values to Tailwind utility class names (e.g., bg-surface-card, text-text-primary).
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: tailwind.config.ts extends theme with all token groups. Custom classes like bg-surface-card and text-accent resolve correctly in built CSS.
tasks.notes: Completed per commit 2194aed. CSS variables approach used for dynamic theming.

tasks.title: Mission Control page
tasks.description: Build the main dashboard page at app/mission-control/page.tsx. Shows: overall phase progress, current phase status, task completion ratio, recent ADRs, active blockers, and system health.
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: Page renders at /mission-control with phase progress bar, task stats, ADR list, blocker list. All data from lib/data.ts. No hardcoded values.

phases.name: Design System & Infrastructure
phases.description: Build the shared CMSMasters UI design system, database schema, auth/RBAC layer, shared packages, JSON validation schemas, CI/CD infrastructure, and Storybook.

tasks.title: Color tokens
tasks.description: Define the full color token system for all 65 portal themes: primary, secondary, surface, text, border, status, and accent token groups with light/dark variants.
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: Color tokens cover all semantic groups (brand, surface, text, border, status, accent). Token values support 65 themes via CSS custom properties.

tasks.title: Typography tokens
tasks.description: Define font families (sans, mono, display), font sizes (xs through 5xl), font weights, line heights, and letter spacing tokens. Map to Tailwind utilities.
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: Typography tokens exported from tokens/typography.ts. Tailwind config extends with text-*, font-*, and leading-* classes mapped to token values.

tasks.title: Spacing tokens
tasks.description: Define spacing scale (4px base grid) from 0 to 96. Map to Tailwind spacing utilities. Ensure consistent rhythm across all components.
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: Spacing tokens from space-0 through space-96 defined. Tailwind config extends spacing scale. No hardcoded px values in any component.

tasks.title: Border radius tokens
tasks.description: Define border radius token scale from none through full. Include semantic aliases (radius-card, radius-button, radius-input, radius-badge).
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: Radius tokens and semantic aliases defined. Tailwind config includes rounded-card, rounded-button etc. via plugin.

tasks.title: Shadow tokens
tasks.description: Define box-shadow token levels: none, sm, md, lg, xl, 2xl, and themed glow variants (glow-primary, glow-accent). Support dark mode shadow adjustments.
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: Shadow tokens defined with dark mode variants. Tailwind extends boxShadow with shadow-sm through shadow-2xl and shadow-glow-* variants.

tasks.title: Animation tokens
tasks.description: Define animation duration (fast: 150ms, default: 250ms, slow: 400ms, slower: 600ms), easing curves, and keyframe definitions for entrance/exit/loading animations.
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: Animation tokens defined in tokens/animation.ts. Tailwind extends transitionDuration and transitionTimingFunction. Keyframes for fade-in, slide-up, slide-down, scale-in defined.

tasks.title: Token index export
tasks.description: Create packages/@cmsmasters/ui/src/tokens/index.ts that re-exports all token modules. Enables single-import consumption: import { colors, typography, spacing } from '@cmsmasters/ui/tokens'.
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: tokens/index.ts re-exports all token groups. TypeScript types exported for each token group. Barrel import works in consuming apps.

tasks.title: Button atom
tasks.description: Build Button component with variants (primary, secondary, ghost, destructive, link), sizes (sm, md, lg), loading state, disabled state, and icon slots (left/right).
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: Button renders all variants and sizes. Keyboard accessible (focus ring). Loading spinner shows. Accepts asChild prop for polymorphic rendering. Storybook stories cover all states.

tasks.title: Badge atom
tasks.description: Build Badge component with color variants (default, primary, success, warning, error, info) and size variants (sm, md). Supports dot indicator and removable (x) mode.
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: Badge renders all color and size variants. Dot mode shows colored circle before text. Removable mode shows X button that calls onRemove callback.

tasks.title: Input atom
tasks.description: Build Input component with label, placeholder, helper text, error state, disabled state, and left/right adornment slots. Supports all HTML input types.
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: Input renders with label, helper, and error text. Error state shows red border + error message. Adornment slots accept icons or text. Fully keyboard accessible.

tasks.title: Select atom
tasks.description: Build Select component (dropdown) with label, placeholder, option groups, error state, disabled state, and searchable mode. Uses native select with custom styling or Radix primitive.
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: Select opens dropdown on trigger, supports keyboard navigation, shows selected value, handles error state. Option groups with headings supported.

tasks.title: Checkbox atom
tasks.description: Build Checkbox component with label, indeterminate state, disabled state, and error state. Supports controlled and uncontrolled usage.
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: Checkbox renders checked, unchecked, indeterminate, and disabled states. Label is clickable. Keyboard accessible (Space to toggle). onChange fires correctly.

tasks.title: Textarea atom
tasks.description: Build Textarea component with label, helper text, error state, disabled state, character count display, and auto-resize mode.
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: Textarea renders with label, helper, error. Character count shows remaining/max. Auto-resize grows with content. Error state shows red border.

tasks.title: Switch atom
tasks.description: Build Switch toggle component with label, description, disabled state. Smooth animation on toggle. Supports controlled and uncontrolled usage.
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: Switch animates smoothly on toggle. Shows on/off state clearly. Label and description render next to toggle. Keyboard accessible (Space/Enter to toggle).

tasks.title: Avatar atom
tasks.description: Build Avatar component with image, initials fallback, size variants (xs, sm, md, lg, xl), and status indicator (online, offline, busy, away). Supports AvatarGroup for stacked avatars.
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: Avatar renders image with fallback initials. Status dot positioned correctly for all sizes. AvatarGroup stacks avatars with configurable max count and overflow indicator.

tasks.title: Tooltip atom
tasks.description: Build Tooltip component that shows on hover/focus with configurable placement (top, right, bottom, left), delay, and content (text or JSX). Accessible via aria-describedby.
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: Tooltip shows on hover with 300ms delay. Placement auto-adjusts at viewport edges. Keyboard focus also triggers tooltip. ARIA attributes present.

tasks.title: Popover atom
tasks.description: Build Popover component with trigger, content panel, placement options, and click-outside-to-close behavior. Foundation for dropdowns, color pickers, and rich popovers.
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: Popover opens/closes on trigger click. Closes on click outside or Escape key. Content panel positions relative to trigger. Focus trap active when open.

tasks.title: Dialog atom
tasks.description: Build Dialog (modal) component with title, description, footer actions, overlay backdrop, and animated entrance/exit. Focus trap and scroll lock when open.
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: Dialog renders with title, content, footer. Overlay darkens background. Escape closes dialog. Focus trapped inside. Scroll locked on body. Entrance animation plays.

tasks.title: Drawer atom
tasks.description: Build Drawer (slide-in panel) component with top/right/bottom/left placement, overlay, and animated slide-in/out. Used for mobile nav, filters, and detail panels.
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: Drawer slides in from configured edge. Overlay present. Escape closes. Focus trapped. Supports custom widths. Smooth animation on open/close.

tasks.title: Toast atom
tasks.description: Build Toast notification system with types (success, error, warning, info), auto-dismiss timer, manual dismiss, and toast queue/stack management. Positioned at viewport edge.
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: toast.success/error/warning/info() functions work. Toasts queue and stack. Auto-dismiss after configurable duration. Manual dismiss on X click. Accessible via aria-live region.

tasks.title: Skeleton atom
tasks.description: Build Skeleton loading placeholder component with animated shimmer effect. Supports text, circular, rectangular, and custom shapes via className override.
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: Skeleton renders with pulse/shimmer animation. Preset shapes: text (multiple lines), circular (avatar), rectangular (card). Custom dimensions via width/height props.

tasks.title: Spinner atom
tasks.description: Build Spinner loading indicator with size variants (sm, md, lg, xl), color variants, and optional label for screen readers.
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: Spinner renders SVG-based rotating animation. All size and color variants work. aria-label or visually-hidden text present for accessibility.

tasks.title: FormField molecule
tasks.description: Build FormField wrapper that composes Input/Select/Checkbox/Textarea atoms with label, helper text, and error display. Integrates with react-hook-form Controller.
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: FormField wraps any form atom, renders label above and error below. Connects to react-hook-form. Error message from form state renders correctly.

tasks.title: SearchInput molecule
tasks.description: Build SearchInput that combines Input with search icon, clear button, debounced onChange, and optional loading state. Used in all search/filter UIs.
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: SearchInput shows magnifier icon. Debounces onChange by 300ms. Clear button appears when value present. Loading spinner replaces icon when loading=true.

tasks.title: DataTable molecule
tasks.description: Build DataTable with sortable columns, row selection, action column, empty state, and loading skeleton. Consumes typed column definition objects.
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: DataTable renders columns from ColumnDef[]. Sort icons toggle asc/desc. Row checkbox selects rows. Empty state shows message. Loading shows skeleton rows.

tasks.title: Pagination molecule
tasks.description: Build Pagination component with prev/next buttons, page number buttons, jump-to-page input, and items-per-page selector.
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: Pagination shows correct page range. Prev/next disable at boundaries. Page number input validates range. Items-per-page select triggers page reset.

tasks.title: Tabs molecule
tasks.description: Build Tabs component with underline and pill variants, horizontal and vertical orientation, keyboard navigation, and URL-synced active tab (optional).
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: Tabs render tablist and tabpanels with ARIA roles. Arrow key navigation between tabs. Active tab has visible selection indicator. URL sync optional via searchParams.

tasks.title: Breadcrumb molecule
tasks.description: Build Breadcrumb navigation with auto-collapse for deep paths, separator customization, and last item as non-link current page.
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: Breadcrumb renders ordered list with aria-label='breadcrumb'. Last item has aria-current='page'. Auto-collapses paths longer than maxItems with ellipsis.

tasks.title: DatePicker molecule
tasks.description: Build DatePicker with calendar popover, date range mode, disabled dates, min/max date constraints, and locale-aware formatting.
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: DatePicker opens calendar on input click. Calendar navigates months. Range mode selects start-end. Disabled dates are not clickable. Selected date formats correctly for locale.

tasks.title: RichTextEditor molecule
tasks.description: Build RichTextEditor using Tiptap with toolbar (bold, italic, underline, link, bullet list, ordered list, heading levels). Outputs HTML. Used for blog posts and support articles.
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: Editor toolbar shows all formatting buttons. Bold/italic/underline toggle. Link inserts/edits href. Lists work. Heading dropdown levels 1-3. Output is valid HTML.

tasks.title: FileUpload molecule
tasks.description: Build FileUpload with drag-and-drop zone, file type restriction, size limit validation, upload progress bar, and preview thumbnails for images.
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: FileUpload accepts drag-drop and click-to-browse. Validates file type and size before upload. Progress bar shows upload %. Image thumbnails render in preview grid. Error state on invalid files.

tasks.title: NavMenu molecule
tasks.description: Build NavMenu horizontal navigation with dropdown mega-menus, keyboard navigation, and active item highlighting. Used in Portal public nav.
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: NavMenu renders horizontal links. Dropdown opens on hover/click. Mega-menu supports columns. Active route highlighted. Fully keyboard navigable. Mobile hamburger collapses to drawer.

tasks.title: SidebarNav molecule
tasks.description: Build SidebarNav vertical navigation with collapsible groups, active state, icons, badge counts, and collapsible sidebar mode. Used in all authenticated app dashboards.
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: SidebarNav renders grouped nav items. Active route highlighted. Badge count on items. Groups collapse/expand. Sidebar collapses to icon-only mode. Tooltips on icon-only mode.

tasks.title: ThemeCard molecule
tasks.description: Build ThemeCard for the theme marketplace. Shows theme preview swatch grid, name, author, category tags, rating, and install/preview actions.
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: ThemeCard renders 4-color swatch preview, name, author avatar, category badges, star rating, and CTA buttons. Hover state shows preview overlay.

tasks.title: AppCard molecule
tasks.description: Build AppCard for the apps/plugins marketplace. Shows app icon, name, description, version, pricing (free/paid), and install button.
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: AppCard renders icon, name, 2-line description, version tag, pricing badge, and install CTA. Loading state shows skeleton. Installed state shows checkmark.

tasks.title: StatsCard molecule
tasks.description: Build StatsCard for dashboard KPI displays. Shows metric label, value (with formatting), trend indicator (up/down % with color), and optional sparkline chart.
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: StatsCard renders label, large value, trend percentage with arrow icon (green up, red down). Optional sparkline via Recharts renders in card footer.

tasks.title: Supabase schema + RLS policies
tasks.description: Design and apply the full Supabase Postgres schema for all 5 portal apps. Tables: users, organizations, themes, sites, pages, blog_posts, tickets, subscriptions, analytics_events. Apply Row Level Security policies for multi-tenant isolation.
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: All tables created via migration files. RLS enabled on every table. Policies enforce org-level isolation. Schema documented in docs/database.md.

tasks.title: Supabase Auth + RBAC enforcement
tasks.description: Implement authentication flow using Supabase Auth (email/password + OAuth). Define roles: super_admin, org_admin, editor, viewer. Enforce permissions in middleware and server actions.
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: Login/signup flows work. Session persists across refreshes. Role assigned at org membership level. Middleware protects /dashboard/* routes. Server actions check role before mutations.

tasks.title: @cmsmasters/ui package
tasks.description: Publish shared UI package from packages/@cmsmasters/ui with all design tokens, atoms, and molecules. Configure TypeScript types and Tailwind plugin export.
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: Package builds without errors. All components and tokens exported from index. Consuming app can import Button, tokens, etc. Tailwind plugin extends consumer config.

tasks.title: @cmsmasters/db package
tasks.description: Create packages/@cmsmasters/db with typed Supabase client factory, all table types generated from schema, and helper query builders for common operations.
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: Package exports createClient(). All database types generated via supabase gen types. Query helpers exported for users, themes, sites, pages, tickets tables.

tasks.title: @cmsmasters/auth package
tasks.description: Create packages/@cmsmasters/auth with auth helpers: getSession(), requireAuth(), requireRole(), getUser(). Server and client variants. Works with Next.js middleware.
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: Package exports getSession (server), useSession (client), requireAuth (middleware helper), requireRole (server action guard). TypeScript types for User and Role.

tasks.title: @cmsmasters/validators package
tasks.description: Create packages/@cmsmasters/validators with Zod schemas for all entity types (user, theme, site, page, blog post, ticket, settings). Used in server actions and API routes for input validation.
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: Zod schemas defined for all entities. Schemas exported with inferred TypeScript types. Validation error messages are user-friendly. Parse and safeParse both tested.

tasks.title: @cmsmasters/email package
tasks.description: Create packages/@cmsmasters/email with React Email templates for: welcome, email verification, password reset, ticket confirmation, subscription receipt, trial expiring.
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: 6 email templates built with React Email. All templates preview in email dev server. sendWelcome(), sendVerification() etc. exported with typed params. Integration with Resend API.

tasks.title: theme.schema.json
tasks.description: Define JSON Schema for CMSMasters theme objects: id, name, author, category, colorPalette (65-color token map), typography settings, preview images.
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: theme.schema.json validates all required fields. Ajv validation passes for valid theme objects. Invalid themes (missing colors, wrong types) fail validation with useful error messages.

tasks.title: page.schema.json
tasks.description: Define JSON Schema for CMS page objects: id, siteId, slug, title, status (draft/published/archived), content blocks array, SEO meta, og image, publishedAt.
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: page.schema.json validates all page object fields. Content blocks array accepts known block types. Slug format validated (lowercase, hyphens only).

tasks.title: blog-post.schema.json
tasks.description: Define JSON Schema for blog post objects: id, siteId, slug, title, excerpt, content (HTML), tags, coverImage, author, status, publishedAt, readingTimeMinutes.
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: blog-post.schema.json covers all fields. Tags validated as string array. readingTimeMinutes is positive integer. coverImage is valid URL or relative path.

tasks.title: faq.schema.json
tasks.description: Define JSON Schema for FAQ objects: id, question, answer (HTML), category, tags, order, publishedAt. Used in Support and Portal FAQ sections.
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: faq.schema.json validates question, answer, category fields. Category is enum of allowed values. Order is non-negative integer.

tasks.title: user.schema.json
tasks.description: Define JSON Schema for user profile objects: id, email, fullName, avatarUrl, role, orgId, plan (free/starter/pro/enterprise), preferences, createdAt.
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: user.schema.json validates all profile fields. Email format validated. Role and plan are enums. Preferences is typed object with known keys.

tasks.title: settings.schema.json
tasks.description: Define JSON Schema for site and org settings objects: orgId, siteName, domain, favicon, logo, theme (themeId), locales (array), timezone, billing settings.
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: settings.schema.json validates org and site settings. Domain validated as hostname format. Locales validated as ISO 639-1 codes. Timezone validated against IANA list.

tasks.title: Supabase project setup
tasks.description: Create Supabase project (prod + staging environments), configure custom domain, set up connection pooling, enable pg_vector and pg_cron extensions.
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: Supabase projects created for prod and staging. Connection strings in Vault/env. pg_vector enabled for AI features. pg_cron enabled for scheduled jobs. Custom domain configured.

tasks.title: GitHub Actions CI pipeline
tasks.description: Set up CI pipeline with jobs: typecheck, lint, test, build. Run on all PRs and main branch. Cache node_modules and Next.js build cache for speed.
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: CI runs on every PR. All 4 jobs pass before merge allowed. Build artifacts cached. Average pipeline under 3 minutes. Failure notifications to Slack.

tasks.title: Preview deploys
tasks.description: Configure Vercel (or equivalent) preview deployments for every PR. Auto-comment preview URL on PR. Staging branch auto-deploys to staging environment.
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: Every PR gets unique preview URL. Preview uses staging Supabase. Bot comments URL on PR creation. Merge to main deploys to production.

tasks.title: Environment variable management
tasks.description: Set up environment variable strategy: .env.local for dev, Vercel env for production, GitHub Secrets for CI. Document all required vars in docs/env.md.
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: .env.example documents all vars with descriptions. Validation script checks required vars on app startup. docs/env.md lists all vars with purpose and example values.

tasks.title: Monitoring and alerting
tasks.description: Integrate error monitoring (Sentry), performance monitoring (Vercel Analytics or Datadog), and uptime checks. Configure alerting thresholds for error rate and p95 latency.
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: Sentry captures errors in production. Source maps uploaded. Vercel Analytics shows Core Web Vitals. Uptime monitor pings /health endpoint. Alerts fire when error rate exceeds 1%.

tasks.title: Storybook 8 setup with dark theme
tasks.description: Install and configure Storybook 8 in packages/@cmsmasters/ui. Configure Tailwind integration, dark theme as default, and autodocs. Add stories for all atoms and molecules.
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: Storybook runs on port 6006. All atom and molecule components have stories. Dark theme default. Autodocs generates docs from JSDoc + prop types. Chromatic visual testing optional.

phases.name: Portal (Public-Facing Site)
phases.description: Build the public-facing CMSMasters Portal website: marketing homepage, features pages, pricing, blog, theme marketplace, app marketplace, and documentation.

tasks.title: Marketing homepage
tasks.description: Build the portal homepage with hero section, features overview, social proof (testimonials, logos), pricing preview, and CTA sections. SEO-optimized with structured data.
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: Page renders with all sections. Lighthouse score > 90 for Performance and SEO. Structured data (Organization, Product) present. CTA buttons link to signup.

tasks.title: Pricing page
tasks.description: Build pricing page with plan comparison table (Free, Starter, Pro, Enterprise), monthly/annual toggle with savings callout, feature checklist per plan, and FAQ section.
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: All 4 plans displayed with features. Annual toggle shows 20% discount. Highlighted recommended plan. FAQ answers 10+ common pricing questions.

tasks.title: Theme marketplace
tasks.description: Build theme marketplace with filterable grid of 65 themes, category filters, search, preview modal, and install/purchase flow. Uses ThemeCard molecule.
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: Theme grid renders all themes. Category and search filters work. Preview modal shows full theme preview. Install button triggers auth check then install flow.

tasks.title: App marketplace
tasks.description: Build app/plugin marketplace with categorized grid, search, detail pages, and install flow. Covers integrations, plugins, and starter kits.
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: App grid renders with categories. Search filters results. Detail page shows screenshots, description, pricing, compatibility. Install triggers subscription check.

tasks.title: Blog
tasks.description: Build blog listing and detail pages. Supports categories, tags, author pages, and related posts. Content managed via Studio app. SEO-optimized with OG images.
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: Blog listing shows posts with pagination. Detail page renders full HTML content. OG image auto-generated. Tags and category pages work. Related posts widget shows 3 articles.

tasks.title: Documentation site
tasks.description: Build docs site with sidebar navigation, full-text search, versioned docs, code examples with syntax highlighting, and auto-generated API reference from TypeScript types.
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: Docs sidebar reflects docs/ directory structure. Search returns relevant results. Code blocks have copy button and syntax highlighting. API reference generated from JSDoc.

tasks.title: Authentication pages
tasks.description: Build signup, login, forgot password, reset password, and email verification pages. Consistent with portal design. Integrates with @cmsmasters/auth.
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: All auth pages render correctly. Form validation shows inline errors. Success states redirect correctly. Magic link and OAuth options present on login page.

tasks.title: SEO and analytics integration
tasks.description: Configure Next.js metadata API for all portal pages. Set up sitemap.xml generation, robots.txt, structured data, and integrate analytics (Google Analytics / Plausible).
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: All pages have title, description, canonical URL. Sitemap generated at /sitemap.xml. robots.txt present. Analytics script loads without blocking render.

phases.name: Dashboard (Subscriber Dashboard)
phases.description: Build the authenticated subscriber dashboard: site management, theme customizer, analytics overview, billing management, and settings.

tasks.title: Dashboard shell and navigation
tasks.description: Build authenticated dashboard layout with SidebarNav, top header with user menu, notification bell, and breadcrumb. Protected by auth middleware.
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: Dashboard layout renders with sidebar, header. Unauthenticated users redirected to login. SidebarNav highlights active route. Mobile responsive with drawer nav.

tasks.title: Site management
tasks.description: Build site listing, create, and settings pages. Users can create multiple sites, configure domains, toggle site status (live/maintenance), and delete sites.
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: Sites list shows all user sites with status badges. Create flow validates domain availability. Site settings save to DB. Delete requires confirmation dialog.

tasks.title: Theme customizer
tasks.description: Build visual theme customizer that lets users adjust colors, fonts, spacing and preview changes in real-time. Saves customizations as theme overrides to DB.
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: Customizer panel shows color pickers, font selectors, spacing sliders. Preview pane updates in real-time. Save button persists customizations. Reset restores base theme.

tasks.title: Analytics overview
tasks.description: Build analytics dashboard with page views, unique visitors, top pages, traffic sources, and engagement metrics. Date range picker. Powered by Recharts.
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: Analytics page shows KPI cards, line chart for traffic over time, top pages table, traffic sources donut chart. Date range picker filters all charts.

tasks.title: Billing and subscription management
tasks.description: Build billing page with current plan display, usage metrics, upgrade/downgrade flow, payment method management, invoice history, and cancellation flow.
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: Billing page shows current plan, usage bars, next invoice date. Stripe integration handles payment methods. Invoice list downloadable as PDF. Cancel flow has confirmation step.

tasks.title: Team and user management
tasks.description: Build team management page for org admins: invite team members by email, assign roles, remove members, and view activity log.
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: Team page lists members with roles. Invite form sends email via @cmsmasters/email. Role dropdown restricted to org_admin role. Remove confirmation dialog. Activity log shows last 30 events.

tasks.title: Account settings
tasks.description: Build account settings page: profile info (name, avatar, email), password change, notification preferences, connected accounts (OAuth), and danger zone (delete account).
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: Profile form saves name and uploads avatar to Supabase Storage. Password change validates current password. Notification prefs saved to user preferences. Delete account requires email confirmation.

phases.name: Support (Help Center + Tickets)
phases.description: Build the customer support system: public help center with articles and FAQs, ticket creation and tracking, and admin ticket management queue.

tasks.title: Help center public site
tasks.description: Build public help center with category navigation, article search, featured articles, and breadcrumb navigation. Articles rendered from Supabase or markdown files.
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: Help center homepage shows category cards with article counts. Search returns relevant articles. Article detail page renders rich content with table of contents.

tasks.title: FAQ system
tasks.description: Build FAQ listing and search with accordion-style answers, category filtering, helpful/not helpful voting, and 'still need help?' CTA to ticket creation.
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: FAQ page shows all categories. Accordion opens on click. Search filters questions. Vote buttons update counts. CTA links to ticket form.

tasks.title: Ticket creation flow
tasks.description: Build multi-step ticket creation form: category selection, issue description, screenshot upload, suggested articles (AI-powered), and submission confirmation.
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: Multi-step form validates each step before proceeding. Screenshot upload to Supabase Storage. Suggested articles shown after description entered. Confirmation email sent on submit.

tasks.title: Ticket tracking (subscriber view)
tasks.description: Build ticket list and detail pages for subscribers. Shows ticket status, agent replies, and reply form. Real-time updates via Supabase Realtime.
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: Ticket list shows all user tickets with status badges. Detail page shows conversation thread. Reply form sends message. Real-time updates when agent replies.

tasks.title: Support agent queue (admin view)
tasks.description: Build internal ticket queue for support agents: list with filters (status, priority, assignee), ticket detail with reply, internal notes, status transitions, and assignment.
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: Agent queue shows all tickets with filter/sort. Detail view has reply, internal notes, assign, and status change. SLA timer visible. Bulk actions for status updates.

tasks.title: AI-powered article suggestions
tasks.description: Integrate Claude API to suggest relevant help articles when a ticket is being written. Uses semantic search over article embeddings stored in pg_vector.
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: As user types ticket description, suggested articles appear after 500ms debounce. Suggestions use Claude embeddings + pg_vector similarity search. Top 3 results shown with relevance score.

phases.name: Studio (Content Creation Tools)
phases.description: Build the content creation and management studio: page builder, blog editor, media library, form builder, SEO tools, and content scheduling.

tasks.title: Page builder canvas
tasks.description: Build drag-and-drop page builder with block palette, canvas area, properties panel, responsive preview toggle, and publish flow. Outputs structured JSON content blocks.
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: Canvas accepts block drops. Blocks repositionable via drag. Properties panel updates on block select. Mobile/tablet/desktop preview modes. Publish saves to DB.

tasks.title: Blog post editor
tasks.description: Build blog post editor with RichTextEditor, SEO fields (title, meta description, OG image), tag management, author selection, and scheduled publish.
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: Editor saves draft on blur. SEO panel shows character counts with optimal range indicators. Tag autocomplete from existing tags. Schedule publish shows datetime picker.

tasks.title: Media library
tasks.description: Build media library with grid/list view, upload (drag-drop + browse), search, filter by type (image/video/document), and asset detail panel with metadata editing.
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: Media grid shows thumbnails. Upload queue with progress. Search filters by name and tag. Asset detail shows dimensions, size, URL. Alt text and caption editable.

tasks.title: Form builder
tasks.description: Build no-code form builder: drag fields (text, email, select, checkbox, file), configure validation rules, set redirect/thank-you message, and view submissions.
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: Field palette drag-and-drop onto canvas. Each field has label, required toggle, validation. Form preview shows live rendering. Submissions stored in DB and exportable as CSV.

tasks.title: SEO tools panel
tasks.description: Build SEO analysis panel for pages and blog posts: title length checker, meta description evaluator, keyword density analyzer, og image previewer (Twitter + Facebook).
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: SEO panel shows green/yellow/red indicators per field. OG preview shows Twitter card and Facebook post simulations. Keyword suggestions based on content.

tasks.title: Content scheduling and calendar
tasks.description: Build content calendar showing scheduled publishes across all content types. Drag posts to reschedule. Week/month view toggle. Conflict detection for same-time publishes.
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: Calendar shows scheduled content in month view. Drag rescheduling updates publishedAt. Week view shows hourly slots. Conflict warning if two posts scheduled same minute.

tasks.title: AI content assistant
tasks.description: Integrate Claude API for AI writing assistance: generate blog post outlines, expand bullet points to paragraphs, improve readability, and suggest meta descriptions.
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: AI panel in editor has Generate, Improve, Summarize, and Meta Description buttons. Streaming response shown in real-time. User can accept, edit, or discard AI output.

tasks.title: Content versioning and history
tasks.description: Implement content version history for pages and blog posts. Show diff view between versions. Restore any previous version. Limit history to 30 versions per content item.
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: Version history panel shows last 30 saves with timestamp and author. Diff view highlights changes. Restore button creates new version from old content.

phases.name: Admin (Admin Panel + Analytics)
phases.description: Build the super-admin panel: platform analytics, user management, organization management, theme/app catalog management, support oversight, and system health monitoring.

tasks.title: Admin shell and access control
tasks.description: Build admin app layout with role-gated access (super_admin only). Admin navigation, audit log sidebar, and impersonation controls.
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: Admin app routes blocked for non-super_admin roles. Layout renders admin nav. Impersonation banner shows when impersonating. Audit log records all admin actions.

tasks.title: Platform analytics dashboard
tasks.description: Build admin analytics with platform-wide KPIs: total users, active sites, MRR, churn rate, support volume, theme installs. Recharts-powered charts with date range filters.
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: Analytics page shows all KPI cards. MRR trend line chart. User growth area chart. Churn cohort table. Date range filters all charts. Export to CSV button.

tasks.title: User and organization management
tasks.description: Build user and org management tables with search, filter, inline role editing, account suspension, and org detail pages showing all sites, members, and billing.
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: User table searchable and filterable by plan and status. Role editable inline. Suspend/unsuspend toggle. Org detail page shows all associated data.

tasks.title: Theme and app catalog management
tasks.description: Build admin catalog manager for themes and apps: create, edit, publish/unpublish, set pricing, add screenshots, and moderate user reviews.
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: Theme CRUD form with all schema fields. Publish toggle visible in list. Screenshot upload with drag-reorder. Review moderation with approve/reject actions.

tasks.title: Support oversight
tasks.description: Build admin-level support view: all tickets across all orgs, agent performance metrics, CSAT scores, escalation queue, and SLA compliance report.
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: Admin ticket list shows all tickets. Agent metrics table shows response time, resolution rate, CSAT. Escalation queue filterable by SLA breach. Monthly SLA report downloadable.

tasks.title: System health and infra monitoring
tasks.description: Build system health page: database metrics (connections, query latency), edge function invocations and errors, storage usage, email delivery stats, and active incidents.
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: Health page shows DB connection count, avg query latency, edge function error rate. Storage gauge. Email delivery rate and bounce rate. Active incidents banner if any.

tasks.title: Global settings and feature flags
tasks.description: Build global settings panel: feature flag management (enable/disable features per plan or org), system announcement banners, maintenance mode toggle, and API rate limit config.
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: Feature flags table with toggle per flag. Plan-based targeting for flags. Announcement banner editor with preview. Maintenance mode toggle with custom message. Rate limit sliders per tier.
